markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Content audit and feedback session for Jess and Timmy's work, focusing on improving article structure and content quality.](https://fathom.video/share/5BMEasCsXbo4q5Ccp517xKVRQFJytvBy?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Avoid overuse of colon structure in headlines; it's an LLM tendency that should be minimized](https://fathom.video/share/5BMEasCsXbo4q5Ccp517xKVRQFJytvBy?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)
  - [Expand introductions to 2-3 paragraphs (2-5 sentences each) to set the tone and engage readers](https://fathom.video/share/5BMEasCsXbo4q5Ccp517xKVRQFJytvBy?tab=summary&timestamp=296.0)
  - [Focus on outcomes rather than feature lists to demonstrate authority and provide value](https://fathom.video/share/5BMEasCsXbo4q5Ccp517xKVRQFJytvBy?tab=summary&timestamp=839.0)
  - [Utilize client-approved sources and case studies for statistics to avoid hallucination issues](https://fathom.video/share/5BMEasCsXbo4q5Ccp517xKVRQFJytvBy?tab=summary&timestamp=676.0)
  - [Expand on crucial topics (e.g., "cold start problem") that align with the article's premise](https://fathom.video/share/5BMEasCsXbo4q5Ccp517xKVRQFJytvBy?tab=summary&timestamp=1005.0)

## Topics

### Headline Structure

  - [LLMs tend to overuse colon structure in headlines (70%+ of content)](https://fathom.video/share/5BMEasCsXbo4q5Ccp517xKVRQFJytvBy?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)
  - [Recommendation: Avoid this format, even editing pre-given headlines if necessary](https://fathom.video/share/5BMEasCsXbo4q5Ccp517xKVRQFJytvBy?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [Test readability by speaking headlines aloud; if it's awkward, revise](https://fathom.video/share/5BMEasCsXbo4q5Ccp517xKVRQFJytvBy?tab=summary&timestamp=573.0)

### Introduction Optimization

  - [Aim for 2-3 paragraphs, 2-5 sentences each](https://fathom.video/share/5BMEasCsXbo4q5Ccp517xKVRQFJytvBy?tab=summary&timestamp=296.0)
  - [Include valuable statistics and keyword-rich content for SEO snippets](https://fathom.video/share/5BMEasCsXbo4q5Ccp517xKVRQFJytvBy?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [Balance between brevity and providing a compelling overview](https://fathom.video/share/5BMEasCsXbo4q5Ccp517xKVRQFJytvBy?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
  - [Use intro as a "mini recap" to entice readers and qualify their interest](https://fathom.video/share/5BMEasCsXbo4q5Ccp517xKVRQFJytvBy?tab=summary&timestamp=358.0)

### Statistics and Source Management

  - [Request client-approved sources during kickoff meetings](https://fathom.video/share/5BMEasCsXbo4q5Ccp517xKVRQFJytvBy?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Two-step process for finding statistics:](https://fathom.video/share/5BMEasCsXbo4q5Ccp517xKVRQFJytvBy?tab=summary&timestamp=676.0)
    1.  Ask LLM for reputable sources on the topic
    2.  Request statistics only from those verified sources
  - [Future workflow: Develop a "statistics populator" tool for easier insertion](https://fathom.video/share/5BMEasCsXbo4q5Ccp517xKVRQFJytvBy?tab=summary&timestamp=714.0)

### Content Focus and Depth

  - [Prioritize outcomes over feature lists](https://fathom.video/share/5BMEasCsXbo4q5Ccp517xKVRQFJytvBy?tab=summary&timestamp=839.0)
  - [Example: "Self-directed learning activity grew by 40%" instead of listing LMS features](https://fathom.video/share/5BMEasCsXbo4q5Ccp517xKVRQFJytvBy?tab=summary&timestamp=906.0)
  - [Expand on crucial topics (e.g., "cold start problem" in LMS) that align with article premise](https://fathom.video/share/5BMEasCsXbo4q5Ccp517xKVRQFJytvBy?tab=summary&timestamp=1005.0)
  - [Use internal tools (e.g., ChatGPT panels) to identify and emphasize key pain points](https://fathom.video/share/5BMEasCsXbo4q5Ccp517xKVRQFJytvBy?tab=summary&timestamp=1176.0)

### Client-Specific Considerations

  - [Adapt content style to client preferences (e.g., bullet point density)](https://fathom.video/share/5BMEasCsXbo4q5Ccp517xKVRQFJytvBy?tab=summary&timestamp=1169.0)
  - [Leverage client case studies and data when available](https://fathom.video/share/5BMEasCsXbo4q5Ccp517xKVRQFJytvBy?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
  - [Balance between general best practices and client-specific requirements](https://fathom.video/share/5BMEasCsXbo4q5Ccp517xKVRQFJytvBy?tab=summary&timestamp=1169.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Implement headline revision process, moving away from colon structure](https://fathom.video/share/5BMEasCsXbo4q5Ccp517xKVRQFJytvBy?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)
  - [Develop workflow for inserting verified statistics and client-approved sources](https://fathom.video/share/5BMEasCsXbo4q5Ccp517xKVRQFJytvBy?tab=summary&timestamp=714.0)
  - [Create internal data store to improve understanding of clients across projects](https://fathom.video/share/5BMEasCsXbo4q5Ccp517xKVRQFJytvBy?tab=summary&timestamp=1232.0)
  - [Utilize ChatGPT panels to identify key pain points and areas for expansion in articles](https://fathom.video/share/5BMEasCsXbo4q5Ccp517xKVRQFJytvBy?tab=summary&timestamp=1176.0)
  - [Continue refining content to focus on outcomes and deliver on article premises](https://fathom.video/share/5BMEasCsXbo4q5Ccp517xKVRQFJytvBy?tab=summary&timestamp=817.0)
